description_long: This object is a compact, modern internet cafe kiosk with a deep purple exterior and a sleek, angular design. The front features a recessed counter area with a built-in digital display screen, which is illuminated and likely used for check-in or information purposes. The sides are solid and blocky, providing a sense of privacy and enclosure for users seated at the station. The back is mostly featureless except for a small scuff mark, emphasizing the utilitarian nature of the structure. The top surface is flat and broad, suitable for placing small items or devices. The overall appearance is minimalist, with a focus on functionality and digital interaction.
description: A sleek, purple internet cafe kiosk with a built-in digital display and a minimalist, angular design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the recessed counter, digital display screen, and angular side panels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the kiosk and the angled placement of the display screen.
description_view_2: Rear view is mostly solid and unadorned, with a small scuff mark visible on the left.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the depth and angular design of the kiosk.
attribute_signage: A digital display screen is present on the front counter, showing illuminated text and icons in a modern style. No other signage is visible.
attribute_computer_station_visibility: One computer station is visible, integrated into the counter with a digital display screen. No seating or additional stations are visible.
attribute_neon_lighting: The digital display emits a soft, light blue glow, but no traditional neon or LED strip lighting is visible.
